inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Text to Classify
inputs.description: Text to be assigned to one of the configured labels.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Model Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured model at runtime.

inputs.name: labels
inputs.label: Labels Override
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of categories, overriding the configured setting.

outputs.name: label
outputs.label: Matched Label
outputs.description: Category the text was assigned to.

outputs.name: reasoning
outputs.label: Reasoning
outputs.description: Explanation of why this label was chosen.

outputs.name: all
outputs.label: All Results
outputs.description: Ranked list of all labels with confidence scores.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the AI call failed.

properties.label: Classification Context
properties.placeholder: Classify the sentiment of customer support emails.
